message:
🐛 Fix SpeechRecognition handler leak in useMicrophoneInput (#10804)

stopRecordingInternal now aborts recognition and nulls out all event
handlers (onstart, onresult, onerror, onend) before releasing the
media stream. Prevents stale callbacks and memory leaks on repeated
start/stop cycles. Also adds useEffect cleanup on unmount.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
